metadata.description: Chuqlab Brand CSS Design System - Tailwind CSS v4 theme with brand colors, typography, and utility classes

plugins.name: chuqlab-css-theme-plugin
plugins.description: Applies the Chuqlab brand CSS design system to any Tailwind CSS v4 project. Includes brand color palette (primary navy #141246, secondary red #EC1848, accent blue #0842EA), Geist font configuration, and utility classes for backgrounds and masks. Use when theming a project with Chuqlab branding, setting up Tailwind v4 themes, or applying consistent corporate design tokens.
